debug_info.goal:
x y z : ℝ
h₀ : 0 ≤ x ∧ 0 ≤ y ∧ 0 ≤ z
h₁ : x + y + z = 1
⊢ 0 ≤ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ∧ y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z ≤ 7 / 27

failed_attempts:
have h_bound : x ≤ 1 ∧ y ≤ 1 ∧ z ≤ 1 := by nlinarith
  constructor
  · have id : (x + y + z) * (y * z + z * x + x * y) - 9 * x * y * z =
        x * (y - z)^2 + y * (z - x)^2 + z * (x - y)^2 := by ring
    have : 0 ≤ x * (y - z)^2 + y * (z - x)^2 + z * (x - y)^2 := by nlinarith
    rw [h₁, one_mul] at id
    linarith
  · let a := 1 - 2 * x
    let b := 1 - 2 * y
    let c := 1 - 2 * z
    have ha : a ≤ 1 := by linarith
    have hb : b ≤ 1 := by linarith
    have hc : c ≤ 1 := by linarith
    have sum_one : a + b + c = 1 := by linarith
    have id : 4 * (y * z + z * x + x * y - 2 * x * y * z) = 1 + a * b * c := by ring
    rw [id]
    suffices a * b * c ≤ 1 / 27 by linarith
    by_cases h : 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ b ∧ 0 ≤ c
    · rcases h with ⟨ha', hb', hc'⟩
      have : 4 * b * c ≤ (b + c)^2 := by nlinarith
      have : 4 * a * b * c ≤ a * (1 - a)^2 := by nlinarith
      have : 4/27 - a * (1 - a)^2 = (1/27) * (3 * a - 1)^2 * (4 - 3 * a) := by ring
      nlinarith
    · have : a * b * c ≤ 0 := by
        push_neg at h
        rcases h with (ha'|hb'|hc')
        · have : 0 ≤ b ∧ 0 ≤ c := by
            by_contra hn; push_neg at hn; rcases hn with (hb'|hc');
            · have : c > 1 := by linarith; linarith
            · have : b > 1 := by linarith; linarith
          nlinarith
        · have : 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ c := by
            by_contra hn; push_neg at hn; rcases hn with (ha'|hc');
            · have : c > 1 := by linarith; linarith
            · have : a > 1 := by linarith; linarith
          nlinarith
        · have : 0 ≤ a ∧ 0 ≤ b := by
            by_contra hn; push_neg at hn; rcases hn with (ha'|hb');
            · have : b > 1 := by linarith; linarith
            · have : a > 1 := by linarith; linarith
          nlinarith
      linarith
